description: The Fourth Noble Truth — the path leading to the cessation of suffering. The Noble Eightfold Path comprises: Right View, Right Intention, Right Speech, Right Action, Right Livelihood, Right Effort, Right Mindfulness, Right Samādhi. Magga (path consciousness) arises at the moment of path attainment; phala (fruition) follows immediately. There are four magga levels corresponding to the four stages of awakening.
